examples: They are both transmitted by Anopheles mosquitoes.
Carried by the female anopheles mosquito, malaria is a disease of the poor.
In Africa, the Anopheles gambiae mosquito is the principle carrier of the malarial parasite Plasmodium falciparum, the most dangerous of four different parasites.
Dr Sharma told the meeting that fish had virtually eliminated malaria-carrying Anopheles mosquitoes from some districts, though he cautioned that the strategy did not work everywhere.
